Program Overview
Aligned to the AAPC, NHA &
AHIMA national coding standards

Turn care into code

As a medical biller and coder, you'll be the link between healthcare providers and insurance payers — translating clinical care into accurate codes and clean claims. Our online program teaches the skills that matter on the job, from anywhere.

You'll learn diagnosis coding with ICD-10-CM, procedure coding with CPT and HCPCS, insurance and payer rules, CMS-1500 and electronic claims, compliance and privacy, and hospital billing and payment posting.

After finishing, you'll be ready to take the AAPC CPC, NHA CBCS and AHIMA CCA exams — three of the most in-demand coding credentials employers look for.
